mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device_locations(device_id, latitude, longitude, accuracy, altitude, speed, battery_level, address, provider, timestamp, created_at) VALUES (#{deviceId}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{accuracy}, #{altitude}, #{speed}, #{batteryLevel}, #{address}, #{provider}, #{timestamp}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT dl.*, d.number as device_number FROM device_locations dl JOIN devices d ON dl.device_id = d.id WHERE dl.device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY dl.timestamp DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT dl.*, d.number as device_number FROM device_locations dl JOIN devices d ON dl.device_id = d.id JOIN ( SELECT device_id, MAX(timestamp) as max_timestamp FROM device_locations WHERE device_id IN (SELECT id FROM devices WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}) GROUP BY device_id ) latest ON dl.device_id = latest.device_id AND dl.timestamp = latest.max_timestamp WHERE d.customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO geofences(customer_id, name, description, latitude, longitude, radius, enter_notification, exit_notification, active, created_at) VALUES (#{customerId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{radius}, #{enterNotification}, #{exitNotification}, #{active}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE geofences SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, radius = #{radius}, enter_notification = #{enterNotification}, exit_notification = #{exitNotification}, active = #{active} WHERE id = #{id} AND customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO geofence_devices (geofence_id, device_id) VALUES
(#{geofenceId}, #{deviceId})
ON CONFLICT (geofence_id, device_id) DO NOTHING
